caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with gold lettering that reads "BOSS TALK," and over-ear headphones. He is positioned behind a dark desk, speaking into a professional silver microphone attached to a black boom arm. In the background, a white banner displays the phrase "UNICORN HUSTLE" repeatedly, accompanied by gold stars. To the right, a blue banner reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". A black coffee mug with red and white text that says "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD" sits on the desk. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a side-profile view, gesturing with his hand and speaking, while his facial expression shifts slightly as he talks. The camera remains stationary, capturing the consistent studio environment and the man's movements during his conversation.
